name: Vegetable Pork Stir-Fry
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown pork in oil in a large skillet over high heat.
2. Push the meat to one side of the skillet; add vegetables.
3. Stir-fry vegetables for about 3 minutes.
4. Combine chicken broth, soy sauce, and cornstarch in a bowl.
5. Add the mixture to the skillet and cook until clear and thickened.
6. Serve over rice.
